patterns.name: Centralized Authentication Service
patterns.description: Single service handling authentication/authorization across all applications
pros: Single source of truth for user data
cons: Complexity in migration if vendor changes
anti_patterns: Don't hardcode secrets in application code

patterns.name: API Gateway Pattern
patterns.description: Single entry point that routes requests to backend services
anti_patterns: Don't put business logic in gateway
Avoid tight coupling between gateway and services

patterns.name: Event Sourcing Pattern
patterns.description: Store state as sequence of events rather than current state
pros: Can reconstruct any point in time
anti_patterns: Don't use when simple CRUD suffices
Don't forget about snapshotting for performance

patterns.name: Circuit Breaker Pattern
patterns.description: Prevent cascading failures by failing fast when downstream service unavailable
anti_patterns: Don't set too low fail_max threshold

patterns.name: Cache-Aside Pattern
patterns.description: Application manages cache separately from data source

patterns.name: Saga Orchestration Pattern
patterns.description: Manage distributed transactions through compensating actions
